chapter_title.ar: باب اخْتِلَاطِ مَاءِ الْمَطَرِ بِالْبَوْلِ وَ مَا يَرْجِعُ فِي الْإِنَاءِ مِنْ غُسَالَةِ الْجُنُبِ وَ الرَّجُلِ يَقَعُ ثَوْبُهُ عَلَى الْمَاءِ الَّذِي يَسْتَنْجِي بِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 9 – The mingling of the rain water with the urine and what is returned into the vessel from the washing by the one with sexual impurity, and the man’s cloth falls upon the water which he had used for cleaning from the toilet

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/46)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/46)
text: فِي الرَّجُلِ الْجُنُبِ يَغْتَسِلُ فَيَنْتَضِحُ مِنَ الْمَاءِ فِي الْإِنَاءِ فَقَالَ لَا بَأْسَ ما جَعَلَ عَلَيْكُمْ فِي الدِّينِ مِنْ حَرَجٍ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Al Fazl Bin Shazaan, from Hammad Bin Isa, from Rabie Bin Abdullah, from Al Fuzayl Bin Yasaar,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said regarding the man with sexually impurity washing, and some of the water spills over into the vessel. So heasws said: ‘There is no problem. (Allahazwj) [22:78] has not Laid upon you a hardship in the Religion’.
en.sarwar: 7. Muhammad ibn ’Isma‘il has narrated from al-Fadl ibn Shadhan from Hammad ibn ‘Isa from Rib‘i ibn ‘Abd Allah from al-Fudayl ibn Yasar who has said the following: “It is about a man who takes Ghusl (bath) due to sexual matters and water drops sprinkle into the water container. Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘It is not harmful. Allah has not sanctioned anything in religion which causes hardships for you.”’
